item.title: USPS NON-PERISHABLE FOOD ITEMS - 05/04/2026 8:30am EDT to 05/05/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Please bring Non-parishable food items to Allen Eiry in support of USPS. Thank you!
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center

item.title: Make it at Home: Book Page Wreath - 05/04/2026 9:30am EDT to 05/04/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library’s virtual craft series for adults, “Make It At Home,” will offer free supply kits and an instructional video on how to make a book page wreath beginning Monday, May 4. Patrons can pick up a supply kit at the Information Desk full of almost everything needed to make a craft each month, and will only need to use a few basic supplies from home. An instructional video on how to make the wreath will be posted on the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library YouTube channel and Facebook page. Please note that kits will be available on a first-come, first-served basis, and registration is not required. One kit per adult. Must be present to receive your kit. This program is free for adults. If all kits are gone, the instruction video and information sheet can still be found at www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/maymakeitathome.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: Backpackin’ Babies—Frogs! - 05/04/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/04/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 701 E County Rd 6 #6, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA For ages birth to 18 months.  Babies need the great outdoors as much as older youth and adults do.  They need the exposure to fresh air, new environments and learn more than we think.  Spend an hour with Linda Rose exploring the trails while we look for frogs and learn frog facts.   Come in a front pack, backpack, stroller or just walk.   Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks

item.title: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study - 05/04/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/04/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us for Celebrate Recovery Bible Study Monday nights at 6pm. A group for everyone, as we deal with the hurts, hang ups, and habits in life. Bring your family, friends, and neighbors. A time of Bible Study, sharing life, and fellowship. No childcare is provided.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene

item.title: Family Movie Monday - 05/04/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/04/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Family Movie Monday” on Monday, May 4 from 6:00 to 8:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Watch a family movie about a curious monkey at the Library and play BINGO based on the movie to win a small prize. Popcorn will be provided. No registration required. For more information, please stop by the Junior Library or call (419) 447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: Laundry Day - 05/05/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/05/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Sign up for our free laundry days this month, Tuesday, May 5th and 19th, 9am-3pm. Each family can wash 1 load per month free, laundry detergent is also provided. You must sign up online for an appointment by clicking the link below, or contact Fostoria Church of the Nazarene or the United Way of Fostoria by phone to help you sign up. The location is 339 Sandusky Street in the FNC Community Center https://www.signupgenius.com/.../10C0548AEAB2FAAFBC25...
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene

item.title: Willows Tiffin - Coming Soon Assisted Living/Indepencent Living Information - 05/05/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/05/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Get information on the New Assisted Living and Independent Living Patio Homes at the Willows at Tiffin.
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center

item.title: Storytime - 05/05/2026 10:30am EDT to 05/05/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Story Time is best suited for almost 3 year-olds through Kindergarten, lasts for 45-60 minutes, and includes stories, songs, extension activities & a craft.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library

item.title: Teen Tuesday - 05/05/2026 3:00pm EDT to 05/05/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA “Teen Tuesdays” will be returning to the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library every Tuesday from 3:00 p.m. to 4:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room beginning Tuesday, September 2. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly afterschool hangout for games, snacks, crafts and more. For more information, log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: Teen Tuesday - 05/05/2026 3:00pm EDT to 05/05/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA “Teen Tuesdays” will be returning to the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library every Tuesday from 3:00 p.m. to 4:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room beginning Tuesday, September 2. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly afterschool hangout for games, snacks, crafts and more. For more information, log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: Baby Play Date - 05/06/2026 11:00am EDT to 05/06/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library for "Baby Play Date" on Wednesday, May 6, from 11:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. This free event invites babies aged birth to 18 months and their caregivers to enjoy a play date filled with toys and books, while also providing a chance for parents and caregivers to connect with one another. No registration is necessary. For more details, visit the Junior Library or call (419) 447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: Coffee Connect - 05/06/2026 11:00am EDT to 05/06/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 25 Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come meet with the management of Your Legacy Federal Credit Union every first Wednesday of the month at 11AM. This is a chance for members to have a cup of coffee and come voice their concerns, praises, or just ask questions. Eligible Members of the community are welcome to learn more about the "Credit Union Difference" and find out how our 70+ year Seneca County institution can help you with your current finances and future plans!
item.dc:creator: Your Legacy Federal Credit Union

item.title: Teen Art Club - 05/06/2026 3:00pm EDT to 05/06/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Teen Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public library will host “Teen Art Club” on Wednesdays, May 6 and 20 from 3:00 to 4:30 p.m. in the Teen Area. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to get creative with other artsy teens. Teens are encouraged to bring their own drawings and projects or just drop by to explore a new project. The Library will provide craft supplies and the opportunity to learn new arts and crafts skills. For more information, log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: Bible Study in the Book of Acts - 05/06/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/06/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us at 6pm Wednesday Nights for Bible Study through the book of Acts. Everyone is welcome. Childcare is not provided. Contact us with any questions.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene

item.title: Pioneer Workshops: Natives 101 - 05/06/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/06/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the "Pioneer Workshop: Natives 101" at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Wednesday, May 6 at 6:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Led by Ashlee Decker, a restoration ecologist and co-owner of Gaia’s Garden, this workshop will explore the beauty and benefits of incorporating native plants into your home landscape. Participants will learn about the landscapes encountered by early settlers and how reintroducing these plants can benefit both people and wildlife. The presentation will include an introduction to native plants, landscape evaluation tips to choose the right plants for your yard, planting techniques, and maintenance recommendations. This event is part of a series of Pioneer Workshops celebrating the self-sufficient lifestyles of early Americans in the 1700s and 1800s as part of the America 250 celebration. For more information, call 419-447-3751 or visit www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: "Colored Pencil Pear" Wednesday, May 6, 2026 6pm-9pm #05062602 - 05/06/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/06/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA In this class you will use colored pencils to create a 5"x7" drawing of a pear, learning about strokes and blending techniques. All supplies are provided. Preregistration is required by Friday, May 1. Minimum class size is 3 people. The cost is $45 for TAG members & $55 for non-members. Contact Mike Fink (813-695-0506), or TAG (419-443-0478), or tiffinartguild@att.net with questions. You can also stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild

item.title: Level 2 Pastry Class - 05/06/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/06/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Advance your baking skills with our Level 2 Pastry Class, designed to teach intermediate techniques for crafting delectable pastries. Perfect for those with basic experience looking to expand their culinary repertoire.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen

item.title: "English Cottage" Thursday, May 7, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #05072601 or #05072602 - 05/07/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/07/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Pre-registration and payment is required by Friday, May 1. Paint "English Cottage" in water mixable oils with Carol Hoffman on Thursday, May 7 from 9am until 12 pm or from 6pm-9pm. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. Carol will guide you through the process of creating this painting whether you are a beginner or more advanced painter. All of the materials including the 8"x10" canvas are included in the price of the class. Minimum class size 3 people, maximum of 8. Please bring a large box to take your painting home in. Cost is $50 for TAG members & $60 for non-members. Call Carol with questions. 419 624 7020, Tiffin Art Guild at 419-443-0478 (tiffinartguild@att.net), or stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild

item.title: Storytime - 05/07/2026 11:45am EDT to 05/07/2026 12:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Story Time is best suited for almost 3 year-olds through Kindergarten, lasts for 45-60 minutes, and includes stories, songs, extension activities & a craft.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library

item.title: Toddler Trot—Find the Fox - 05/07/2026 12:00pm EDT to 05/07/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Fort Seneca, OH 44883, USA For ages 18 to 36 months.  Join Linda Rose as we walk the trails looking and listening for fox along the way.  Learn about the calls, sizes, habitats and what their favorite food is.  Can you find all of the foxes? Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks

item.title: Spring Fling Ritz Bingo Special - 05/07/2026 4:00pm EDT to 05/07/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Cost to Play $20 Package 1: 1 Early Bird 4-on [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre

item.title: Groundbreaking Celebration: Patio Homes, Clubhouse & Assisted Living Addition - 05/07/2026 4:00pm EDT to 05/07/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 348 Ohio Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Groundbreaking Celebration: Patio Homes, Clubhouse & Assisted Living Addition Join us as we celebrate an exciting new chapter and the future growth of our community. We’re breaking ground on our new patio homes, clubhouse, and Assisted Living wing addition — and you’re invited to be part of this special milestone. Be among the first to learn about what’s coming, connect with our team, and experience the vision for this beautiful expansion. Enjoy light refreshments, enter for door prizes, and celebrate alongside community members, families, and guests as we mark the beginning of something new. Event Details 410 Fair Ln. Tiffin, OH 44883 May 7 4:00 PM Light refreshments provided Door prizes available We look forward to celebrating this exciting groundbreaking and sharing what’s ahead for patio homes, our new clubhouse, and the Assisted Living wing addition.
item.dc:creator: The Willows at Tiffin

item.title: Pokemon Club - 05/07/2026 4:30pm EDT to 05/07/2026 5:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Join us for tabletop games, crafts and Pokemon watch parties! Cards for gaming will be provided. Both new and experienced Pokemon gamers are welcome. For kids in grades K-5.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library

item.title: Special Member Offer | Golf 101 - 05/07/2026 5:30pm EDT to 05/07/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 35 S Monroe St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development

item.title: Beyond the Berg 2026 Senior Night - 05/07/2026 5:30pm EDT to 05/07/2026 6:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : University Hall, 310 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null
item.dc:creator: Heidelberg University Alumni & Friends

item.title: National Day Of Prayer in Fostoria, Ohio - 05/07/2026 6:30pm EDT to 05/07/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Mark your calendars for the National Day of Prayer! We will be at the 6:30pm Community Prayer Downtown in the Greenspace. There will be Youth and Community Choirs, and then prayers from Pastors and Community Leaders as well as students. Please remember to bring a chair. (In case of rain we will be in the Fostoria Church of God directly across the street.)
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene

item.title: Taste of Italy - 05/07/2026 6:30pm EDT to 05/07/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Enjoy the flavors of Italy
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen

item.title: Medicare Fraud Awareness Presentation - 05/08/2026 11:00am EDT to 05/08/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA OPEN TO THE PUBLIC Pre-registration required. Please call 419-448-9774 or stop in for more information.
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center

item.title: Nonprofit Leadership Alliance | Healthy Teams, Strong Missions - 05/08/2026 11:00am EDT to 05/08/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 928 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Seneca Regional Chamber & Development and United Way of North Central Ohio for the second Nonprofit Leadership Alliance quarterly meeting of 2026 on Friday, May 8 at 11 AM, hosted at North Central Ohio ESC. This session is designed for nonprofit leaders, staff, and board members who want to better support themselves and their teams while sustaining meaningful, mission-driven work. The featured topic, “Healthy Teams, Strong Missions: Preventing Burnout & Supporting Mental Well-Being,” will focus on creating workplace cultures that recognize stress, prioritize well-being, and prevent burnout. Presenters Erin Perry, MA, LPCC-S, owner of Counseling Connections Center, and Kim Radison, owner of KKR Consult, will share practical strategies nonprofit organizations can use to promote mental health, build resilience, and support staff at all levels. Attendees will learn how to recognize common signs of stress and burnout, apply self-care and resilience practices, and foster healthier, more supportive work environments. This session is designed to offer realistic, actionable tools that can be implemented immediately within nonprofit teams. Following the presentation, Erin Perry and Kim Radison will offer attendees the opportunity to schedule a free one-on-one session for additional personalized support or consultation. These meetings are free and open to all nonprofit employees and board members in Seneca County. Chamber & Development membership is not required. Join us for an important conversation about caring for the people behind the mission. Register today to secure your spot.
item.dc:creator: United Way of North Central Ohio

item.title: Nonprofit Leadership Alliance | Healthy Teams, Strong Missions - 05/08/2026 11:00am EDT to 05/08/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 928 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Seneca Regional Chamber & Development and United Way of North Central Ohio for the second Nonprofit Leadership Alliance quarterly meeting of 2026 on Friday, May 8 at 11 AM, hosted at North Central Ohio ESC. This session is designed for nonprofit leaders, staff, and board members who want to better support themselves and their teams while sustaining meaningful, mission-driven work. The featured topic, “Healthy Teams, Strong Missions: Preventing Burnout & Supporting Mental Well-Being,” will focus on creating workplace cultures that recognize stress, prioritize well-being, and prevent burnout. Presenters Erin Perry, MA, LPCC-S, owner of Counseling Connections Center, and Kim Radison, owner of KKR Consult, will share practical strategies nonprofit organizations can use to promote mental health, build resilience, and support staff at all levels. Attendees will learn how to recognize common signs of stress and burnout, apply self-care and resilience practices, and foster healthier, more supportive work environments. This session is designed to offer realistic, actionable tools that can be implemented immediately within nonprofit teams. Following the presentation, Erin Perry and Kim Radison will offer attendees the opportunity to schedule a free one-on-one session for additional personalized support or consultation. These meetings are free and open to all nonprofit employees and board members in Seneca County. Chamber & Development membership is not required. Join us for an important conversation about caring for the people behind the mission. Register today to secure your spot.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development

item.title: Kindergarten Skill Building Stations - 05/08/2026 2:00pm EDT to 05/08/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Kindergarten Skill Building Stations” for preschool aged students on Friday, May 8 from 2:00 to 5:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Preschool aged children and their parent or guardian can drop in anytime between 2:00 and 5:00 p.m. to prepare for kindergarten by working on skills including letter recognition, compare and contrast, basic counting, and more. For more information, please call (419) 447-3751 or log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: Corner T Fun - 05/08/2026 4:00pm EDT to 05/08/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Perry St, New Riegel, OH 44853, USA null
item.dc:creator: New Riegel Cafe

item.title: Flower Stand Boxes - 05/08/2026 5:30pm EDT to 05/08/2026 6:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 113 Melmore St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Just in time for Mother's Day! Grab your momma, grab some friends and come hang out at the studio; 5:30PM. Choose from Small, Medium or Large. Or do a combo pack!
item.dc:creator: Rustic Flair & Brush

item.title: 2026 Unity Spring Fling Dinner and Dance - 05/08/2026 5:30pm EDT to 05/08/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : E County Rd, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA UNITY Spring Fling Dinner and Dance (minimal supervision provided): Location: The Seneca County Opportunity Center (780 E County Rd 20) Time: Dinner at 5:30pm-6:30pm, Dance 6:30pm-9pm Dinner includes spaghetti, garlic bread, salad, cake, and punch Tickets are $10. Call Joan to reserve your meal tickets by MONDAY, May 4th at 419-447-7521, ext. 1134. All proceeds benefit Unity Council. Unity Council is a self-advocacy group at the Seneca County Opportunity Center that plans a yearly conference. Unity is a chance to network and build upon their advocacy and leadership skills.
item.dc:creator: Seneca County Opportunity Center

item.title: Painting Class with Kelly - 05/08/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/08/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 6029 OH-101, Clyde, OH 43410, USA Join Kelly Protzman for a painting class! RSVP required. Cost is $35. Archie’s Pizza will be serving up some delicious slices too! Let us know if you can make it!
item.dc:creator: Archie’s Pizza Truck

item.title: Men's Bible Study Women's Bible Study - 05/08/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/08/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Men's Bible Study Women's Bible Study 2nd & 4th Friday at 6pm May 8th and 22nd No childcare provided
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene

item.title: Another Spring Wildflower Hike - 05/08/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/08/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 3362 Infirmary Rd, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Linda Rose as we walk the trails searching for the last of the spring wildflowers.   This walk will last about 1 ¼ hour and qualifies for the Walking Stick Program.  Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks

item.title: "Trumpeter Swan" Saturday, May 9, 2026 9am-1pm #05092601 - 05/09/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/09/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Pre-registration and payment is required by May 2nd. Paint "Trumpeter Swan" in acrylic with Carol Hoffman on Saturday, May 9 from 9 am until 1 pm. This is a 4 hour class. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. Carol will guide you through the process of creating this painting whether you are a beginner or more advanced painter. All of the materials including the 12x16" canvas are included in the price of the class. Please bring a large box to take your painting home in. Cost is $55 for TAG members & $65 for non-members. Call Carol with questions. 419-547-8610, Tiffin Art Guild at 419-443-0478 (tiffinartguild@att.net), or stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild

item.title: Mother-Daughter-Granddaughter Outdoor Day - 05/09/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/09/2026 10:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Any mother-daughter-grand-daughter combination is welcome to spend the morning hiking, fishing, canoeing/kayaking and journaling.  End the morning with a campfire treat. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.   9AM - 12PM.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks

item.title: Spring Migration Bird Hike - 05/09/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/09/2026 10:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1143 Township Rd 243, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us for the Spring Migration Bird Hike at Aeraland Recreation Area! This guided hike is a wonderful opportunity to observe many interesting and colorful birds, including Eastern Meadowlark, Orchard Oriole, Indigo Bunting, Red-eyed Vireo, and a variety of vibrant warblers as they journey to their northern breeding grounds. Binoculars will be provided, or you can bring your own. The event starts at 9 AM, is open to all ages, and is free with no registration required. For more information, you can contact Tim Kleman at tkleman@hancockparks.com.
item.dc:creator: Hancock Park District

item.title: Breakfast at JAM’s Markets SATURDAYS 9-2pm - 05/09/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/09/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Enjoy from scratch made breakfast and lunch items featuring buzzworthy sourdough artisan breads
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets

item.title: 830 Market - Touch a Truck - 05/09/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/09/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 101 N Main St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA BIG TRUCKS. LITTLE KIDS. HUGE FUN. We’re bringing Touch-a-Truck to the 830 Market! City of Fostoria Division of Fire truck City of Fostoria, Ohio Police vehicles Emergency vehicles Turco & Sons Garbage Truck Keller Brothers Enterprise Tow Truck Clouse Construction vehicles And more Let your kids climb, explore, and experience it all up close. This alone is worth coming for. May 9 | 10AM - 2PM Downtown Fostoria Sensory Hour 10-11 AM
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Farmers' Market

item.title: Puzzle Swap - 05/09/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/09/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host a “Puzzle Swap” on Saturday, May 9 from 10:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Give the puzzles you love a second life. Drop in anytime between 10:00 a.m. and 3:00 p.m. to leave puzzles, or pick a new one to take home. Please feel welcome to donate puzzles without taking any in exchange, or select a puzzle even if you don't have one to donate. We only ask that participants try to ensure that donated puzzles have all of their pieces. This program is free and open to all adults. For more information, call 419-447-3751, or go online to www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library

item.title: Run for HOPE 5K - 05/09/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/09/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 491 Coe St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Join the Suicide Prevention Coalition during Mental Health Awareness Month for a 5K Run/Walk.

Lace up your shoes and join us on Saturday, May 9, 2026, for a meaningful community event focused on mental health awareness and suicide prevention.

This 5K brings together runners, walkers, families, and friends to support an important cause. Whether you're aiming for a personal best or enjoying a casual walk, this event is a great way to get active, connect with others, and show your support for mental health awareness in our community.
item.dc:creator: HOPE Fostoria

item.title: Class of 1966 Tours - 05/09/2026 11:00am EDT to 05/09/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 111 S Kansas St, Green Springs, OH 44836, USA Class of 1966 we will be open for tours just for you all! Come browse some artifacts that will for sure bring back some memories.
item.dc:creator: Stemtown Historical Society Museum

item.title: Sisters In Christ - 05/09/2026 12:00pm EDT to 05/09/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Ladies, join us the second Saturday, May 9th 12pm-2pm for Women's Fellowship! Sisters In Christ.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene

item.title: Corner T Fun - 05/09/2026 4:00pm EDT to 05/09/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Perry St, New Riegel, OH 44853, USA null
item.dc:creator: New Riegel Cafe

item.title: 80s Night with No Eileen - 05/09/2026 8:00pm EDT to 05/09/2026 11:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 129 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Live music is back at The Renaissance for one night only! Mark your calendars and clear your Saturday night plans—because The Renaissance is the place to be this May 9th! From 8 to 11 PM, No Eileen takes the stage ready to rock the house with high-energy hits! Whether you’re a longtime fan or love a good night out in Downtown Tiffin, this is your cue to gather your crew, grab a drink, and let the music move you. Live music. Electric energy. Local vibes. Let’s make it a night to remember. See you there!
item.dc:creator: The Renaissance of Tiffin

item.title: 9:30am Sunday School 10:30am Church - 05/10/2026 9:30am EDT to 05/10/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA 9:30am-10:30am Sunday School Classes for Toddlers, Kids, Youth, and Adults on Sunday mornings that study the Bible and talk about applying it to our lives. 10:30am Worship followed by Sunday Service. 10:50am Online, worship at home and join us on Facebook or YouTube at 10:50am live, or watch later at your convenience.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene

item.title: Mother's Day Buffet | Ironwood Restaurant - 05/10/2026 11:00am EDT to 05/10/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 4399 OH-231, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at Ironwood for a Mother’s Day she’ll truly feel. This year, we’re creating something special, an afternoon centered around great food, beautiful views, and meaningful time together. Mother’s Day Buffet at Ironwood Sunday, May 10th 11:00 – 2:00 PM $34.99 plus tax and tip for adults $9.99 kids 4-12 Children 3 and under are free Whether you’re celebrating Mom, Grandma, or someone who’s always shown up for you, this is your moment to slow down and make it count. There will be breakfast items, lunch fare, assorted salads, and desserts. Mark your calendars now and plan to spend your afternoon at Ironwood. Because she deserves more than just a meal, she deserves an experience.
item.dc:creator: Ironwood Steakhouse
